title: pelargonium × sphaerocephalum
intro: Pelargonium × sphaerocephalum, also known as Resurrection Plant or Round-Headed Geranium, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the geranium family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs, colds, and sore throats, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × sphaerocephalum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of this plant are often found in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and are also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
